name: The White House
subject: No American should be forced to choose
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e3382b9029f25e941a039749cf47f648167da78ac12e7cdb3a7246d4325625c86579a87cbceefa738f67a98193847bf1e3

No American should be forced to choose

Today is the 25th federal observance of National Religious Freedom Day. “No American—whether a nun, nurse, baker, or business owner—should be forced to choose between the tenants of faith and law,” President Donald J. Trump’s proclamation reads.

A commitment to religious freedom has guided the Administration throughout its first year in office:

- The President issued an
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e3cc0d278831a8c8a245490220d6e60fe9425eb69260b22642623bf9f8b876a0d510e87723debcb5b00b60d638847efdb2
executive order last May that “protects the freedom of Americans . . . to exercise religion” and minimizes “undue interference by the Federal Government” in areas such as health care
- His Holiness Pope Francis hosted President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at the Vatican last year to discuss how religious communities could help combat terrorism
- Vice President Mike Pence has been a forceful advocate for religious freedom, including in a powerful speech delivered at the World Summit in Defense of Persecuted Christians last May

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e3fe08f746b371e693fe1ae808466d0ba3889ea77b4eb5e31721b30b04380a69f944c247a85e59f48dff97dea693516d88
Read the President’s Religious Freedom Day proclamation here.

Martin Luther King, Jr., model of an American patriot

Martin Luther King, Jr., would have turned 89 yesterday. Instead, his life was cruelly cut short by an assassin’s bullet 50 years ago this April.

King’s greatest legacy is fighting to secure civil rights while strengthening America’s national idea. He understood that our country’s long struggle for equality was not a rejection of American values. To the contrary, it was our Nation’s attempt to live up to them.

“The Reverend’s devotion to fighting the injustice of segregation and discrimination ignited the American spirit of fraternity and reminded us of our higher purpose,” President Trump’s proclamation read.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e3b4b0bc7861e85f3042de0dc46dfa09ee985d5fa30acbb8dc2df2412675a0c3f9af6321d52d20a1734213c299e1867998
If you love America, King’s story is worth remembering.

Plus: Watch President Trump’s
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e30939c3ef5f79cc2d470770998137e9c929dc99ba8341578dac52872d680d4585abd94466f5e303f52f8fdf1b264198dd
weekly address honoring Martin Luther King, Jr.

Statement on the mudslides in California

President Trump has been briefed and will continue to monitor the mudslides in California. The President and First Lady extend their deepest sympathies to the families affected, their appreciation for the first responders saving lives, and their prayers for those who remain missing.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy | January 14, 2018 (Official White House Photo By D. Myles Cullen)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will hold a meeting with
President Nursultan Nazarbayev of Kazakhstan in the Oval Office. The two will then participate in a joint press statement and working lunch.

This morning, Vice President Mike Pence will participate in a phone call with President Ashraf Ghani of Afghanistan. The Vice President will then join President Trump to participate in a working lunch with President Nazarbayev.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=36ddacceb2be79e38f282ee06dc4c8aec1598fe81ef585b0ca0f0e16c88a87cf821fcd7ae05654d50abb5cc0a7e817e7a68d9bdde7eb0ce6
Privacy Policy |

name: Tom Perez
subject: An important request for Derek:
body:
We need your help to invest in grassroots organizing in every single state.
---
Derek --

I'm about to ask you to make a monthly sustaining contribution to the Democratic Party. But first, I want to tell you why this request matters so much at this moment.

We just kicked off an election year. There are great Democratic candidates running in every part of this country -- and they need resources to help them get their message out and win.

Here's the truth, Derek. The investments we make during the next few months will determine wins and losses in November -- and we need your help to invest in grassroots organizing in every single state.

That's why I am asking:

**[Will you make a monthly sustaining donation today to help Democrats organize nationwide and win in November? Any amount you can contribute will make a difference.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea921/3924152223/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc_monthly_sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+make+a+monthly+sustaining+donat&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd")**

Democrats showed what we can accomplish together in 2017 -- but the truth is that our work is just getting started.

We can take back control of Congress and stop the Republican agenda in its tracks.

We can win back power at the local level -- including fighting for the 6,000 state legislature seats on the ballot this year.

We can continue building a party infrastructure that is capable of taking on the Republicans and beating them at the polls.

But the only way we will be able to do any of this if is we work together -- with lots of people chipping in what they can afford. So what do you say, Derek?

**[Help sustain this fight for the long haul with a monthly contribution today. Your contribution -- of any amount -- will be critical to helping Democrats win this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea92e/3924152223/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc_monthly_sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Help+sustain+this+fight+for+the+long+hau&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd")**

Thank you for stepping up today.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea92f/3924152223/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea92c/3924152223/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea92d/3924152223/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522337/4067b0a/4acc52800/7e5ea92a/3924152223/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180116_tp_nd&source=em_20180116_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180116_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: Release: Gov. Kasich to Join Sec. of State Madeleine Albright on PBS NewsHour
body:

Albright for a bipartisan discussion about a new Freedom House
report (viewed here) and America's role in promoting freedom and
prosperity around the world.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

January 16, 2018
Contact: Press@johnkasich.com

Gov. John Kasich to Appear on PBS
NewsHour Tonight

Gov. John Kasich will join former
Secretary of State Madeleine Albright for a bipartisan discussion
about a new Freedom House report (viewed here) and America's role
in promoting freedom and prosperity around the world.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's offshore drilling order [our response]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump is set on turning our ocean into an oil field. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb4/2f5ea88d/73ef7959/2cbc9998/2745419046/VEsH/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/no-coastal-drilling/inslee/") Friend, We won't stand for this. The Trump administration is trying to turn our ocean into an oil field. Secretary Zinke unveiled a plan that would allow more drilling in the Atlantic, Pacific, and Arctic oceans. I don't need to tell you that this is a short-sighted giveaway to the oil industry that will wreck the climate and impact the health of our oceans, permanently. [**We must resist Trump's attempt to sell our oceans to the highest bidder. That's why I've joined with progressive politicians and organizations across America to tell Trump's Interior Department: NO offshore drilling on our coasts.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb4/2f5ea88d/73ef7959/2cbc9998/2745419046/VEsE/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/no-coastal-drilling/inslee/") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb4/2f5ea88d/73ef7959/2cbc9998/2745419046/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/no-coastal-drilling/inslee/") This political decision ignores the utter devastation of past oil spills to wildlife, as well as to the fishing, recreation, and tourism industries of Washington. That's why Republicans and Democrats alike have spent decades opposing oil drilling in these waters. In fact, Zinke's plan makes offshore oil spills more likely by removing safeguards. The magnificent blue Pacific Coast waters could soon be inky black. Our climate is changing. We must reduce our dependence on fossil fuels before our cities flood, our forests burn, and our weather gets even more extreme. Opening up offshore drilling is a huge step in the wrong direction. For more than 30 years, our coastline has been protected from federal drilling. We cannot let that change, especially not now. [**Sign on with us now to stop this reckless, short-sighted mistake. Sign on to stop offshore drilling.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb4/2f5ea88d/73ef7959/2cbc9998/2745419046/VEsC/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/no-coastal-drilling/inslee/") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb4/2f5ea88d/73ef7959/2cbc9998/2745419046/VEsD/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/no-coastal-drilling/inslee/")

**It is hard to believe that we are reaching one year since the inauguration of President Trump’s administration!**
**Many “experts” doubted the President would be able to get our party’s nomination, yet those opinions largely shattered when New Hampshire delivered him a First-in-the-Nation Primary victory.**
**Those same experts doubted he could beat Crooked Hillary Clinton, but our nation was given a great gift when he was victorious in November of 2016.**
**While the Democrats continue to obstruct, our President has accomplished so much - confirming Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court, a record number of judicial nominees, a massive undoing of Obama era regulations, and a great Christmas gift - comprehensive tax reform and the end of Obamacare’s individual mandate.**
**With so many good things since President Trump’s Inauguration, it’s time to celebrate!**

Our celebration starts at 6:30pm this Friday night We will be joined by Jonathan Williams, Vice-President of the American Legislative Exchange Council, with a VIP Reception starting at 6:00pm. name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: The census is under threat
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Every state in America relies on census data to design its electoral
maps. An attack on the legitimacy of the census is an attack on the
legitimacy of our democracy.

President Trump wants to nominate Thomas Brunell, a professor who
literally wrote the book on how to gerrymander, as deputy director of
the Census Bureau. Brunell at the helm of the Bureau could undermine
our democratic legitimacy for decades.

But there’s still time to intervene. And as a LegitAction member, I’m
calling on you to lead the charge on this latest danger to our voting
rights.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/oppose_brunell_nomination/?t=1002&akid=546%2E356062%2EIIvIPO ]Sign LegitAction’s petition: Oppose the appointment of partisan
redistricting advocate Thomas Brunell to serve as deputy director at
the U.S. Census Bureau.

Top Census Bureau officials have historically been career civil
servants with a background in managing federal agencies. Thomas
Brunell has zero public service to his name.

But it’s not just a lack of qualifications that makes Brunell so
dangerous -- it’s his anti-voter agenda. He helped red states like
North Carolina and Alabama draw heavily gerrymandered districts that
effectively silence progressives and voters of color. As deputy
director of the Census Bureau, he could skew the design of the census
itself, leading to partisan electoral maps nationwide.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/oppose_brunell_nomination/?t=1003&akid=546%2E356062%2EIIvIPO ]Thomas Brunell has no place at the Census Bureau. Oppose Brunell
for deputy director of the U.S. Census Bureau. Sign the LegitAction
petition today.

Whenever LegitAction members work together, we achieve meaningful
victories against those who seek to undermine our votes. I know we can
help stop this, too.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today, and every
day.

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/oppose_brunell_nomination/?t=1004&akid=546%2E356062%2EIIvIPO ]TAKE ACTION »

subject: The mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
Team,

Before I was elected Governor, I made a mistake. It was a personal mistake, and I am sorry. I am sorry for the pain it caused to everyone impacted, including Sheena, our boys, our families, our friends, and people who have relied on me. I took responsibility with my family back when this happened, asked for God’s forgiveness and Sheena’s, and Sheena and I dealt with this together, privately. I was, and today I still am, grateful for her forgiveness and love.

Much has now been written about this, and many of the assertions made have not been truthful and have proven extremely hurtful to Sheena, as well as to me. For us, the allegations that go so far beyond the facts have made this much more difficult. I made a mistake, I regret it, and Sheena and I have dealt with it between us. For us, that is where this story starts, and that is where this story ends. We again ask for privacy for everyone involved.

Then and now, we are focused on moving forward. I ask for your forgiveness and hope you can find it in your heart to do so. I assure you that this personal mistake will not deter us from the mission we were sent here to do. We have been, and we will, continue to work for and to fight for the people of Missouri. We will take our state in a new and better direction. There is still much work to be done, and we are back to work for the people of Missouri.

Eric

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=36793bec0f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-36793bec0f-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=36793bec0f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-36793bec0f-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (https://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=36793bec0f) .
